specializations: Alpha, beta, and gamma cyclodextrins for cosmetics
Inclusion complexes for fragrance and active stabilization
product_highlights: CAVAMAX® W6 (α-cyclodextrin) — food-grade complexing agent for cosmetic actives
CAVAMAX® W7 (β-cyclodextrin) — gold-standard for hydrophobic active inclusion complexation
CAVAMAX® W8 (γ-cyclodextrin) — large-cavity cyclodextrin for bulky fragrance molecules
CAVAMASK® modified cyclodextrins — improved aqueous solubility for demanding actives
notes: Wacker Chemie is a leading global specialty chemicals company and the world's foremost manufacturer of cyclodextrins under the CAVAMAX® brand. Their alpha, beta, and gamma cyclodextrin portfolio provides formulators with versatile inclusion complexation tools for enhancing the solubility, stability, and controlled release of hydrophobic actives, fragrances, and UV filters in cosmetic formulations. Wacker's CAVAMAX® W7 is the industry standard beta-cyclodextrin, widely referenced in cosmetic innovation, making them a critical SKIN-TWIN data point for delivery system constraint optimization.
